name: fathomdb
description: TypeScript SDK for FathomDB — napi-rs binding to fathomdb-engine
//napi-platform-split: R-REL-4f. Thin main package: ships NO .node. Each host's binary is a separate @fathomdb/fathomdb-<triple> package (src/ts/npm/<triple>/) carrying os/cpu, resolved by the loader in src/ts/src/platform.ts. optionalDependencies are INJECTED at publish time by scripts/release/npm-inject-optional-deps.sh (one entry per published platform, pinned to this version) so the committed package-lock.json stays in sync with `npm ci`. 0.8.18 publishes ONLY linux-x64-gnu under a non-latest dist-tag (NPM_DIST_TAG); the follow-on orchestrator adds the remaining platforms and promotes latest.

scripts.test: npm run build:native:debug && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node --test dist/tests/*.test.js
